project_long_term_memory: User communication preferences: 1) Respond with key points only, keep answers brief and direct. 2) No special address title required. User background: Game designer developing a combat game (framework suggestions well-received). Also interested in travel planning - requested Xi'an itinerary. Assistant identity: BadDragon, terminal assistant with browser capabilities (tested with Baidu, Taobao, Apple, JD), mouse control capabilities (move, click, drag, scroll), and file creation capabilities (tested and confirmed working).
